label: Compute-optimal scaling & training allocation

node.label: Compute-optimal scaling & training allocation
node.definition: Compute-optimal training allocates a finite budget among parameters, tokens, steps, data quality, and hardware so expected performance is maximized.
node.why_it_matters: It avoids expensive undertraining or oversizing and makes scaling decisions explicit before a large run begins.
limitations: Optimal ratios vary with data reuse, architecture, target tasks, objective, and deployment cost.

sentence_units.text: Compute-optimal training allocates a finite budget among parameters, tokens, steps, data quality, and hardware so expected performance is maximized.
It avoids expensive undertraining or oversizing and makes scaling decisions explicit before a large run begins.
Optimal ratios vary with data reuse, architecture, target tasks, objective, and deployment cost.
